[textmode.js](../../../index.md) / [Textmodifier](../../Textmodifier.md) / log

# Method: log()

```ts
log(value): number;
```

Calculate the natural logarithm of a value.

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| ------ | ------ | ------ |
| `value` | `number` | Value whose natural logarithm should be calculated. |

## Returns

`number`

Natural logarithm.
